Title: Professor Loads Dashboard
Objectives: Verify a logged-in professor can open their dashboard.
Prerequisites: Logged in as an approved, active Professor.
Test Steps:
1. Log in as Professor.
2. Navigate to the Professor Dashboard.
Expected Results: The professor dashboard loads with the student list and fee balances.
Actual Results: The professor dashboard loads with the student list and fee balances.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the professor dashboard renders for a Professor.

Title: Unauthenticated Blocked from Professor Dashboard
Objectives: Verify an unauthenticated user cannot view the professor dashboard.
Test Steps: 1. Without logging in, browse to the Professor Dashboard URL.

Title: Non-Professor Redirected
Objectives: Verify a non-professor role is redirected to their own dashboard.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Admin, Treasurer, or Student.
Test Steps:
1. Log in as a non-professor.
2. Browse to the Professor Dashboard URL.
Expected Results: Redirected to the user's own role dashboard.
Actual Results: Redirected to the user's own role dashboard.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if redirected away to the user's own dashboard.

Title: View Students With Fee Balances
Objectives: Verify the professor can view students and their org-fee status.
Expected Results: Enrolled students are listed with their 1st/2nd semester org-fee balances and status (N/A / Unpaid / Partial / Paid).
Actual Results: Enrolled students are listed with their 1st/2nd semester org-fee balances and status (N/A / Unpaid / Partial / Paid).
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the student list with fee status is displayed.

Title: Search / Filter Students
Objectives: Verify the professor can search and filter the student list.
Test Steps:
1. Type a name/CTU ID in the search.
2. Apply the payment-status, course, year-level, or school-year filters.
Test Data: q = name or CTU ID; filters
Expected Results: The list narrows to the matching students.
Actual Results: The list narrows to the matching students.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if search and filters narrow the list correctly.

Title: View Recent Payments
Objectives: Verify the professor can view recent org-fee payments.
Expected Results: The most recent payments are listed (student, course, amount, status, date).
Actual Results: The most recent payments are listed (student, course, amount, status, date).
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if recent payments are displayed.

Title: View Student Ledger (Read-Only)
Objectives: Verify the professor can open a student's org-fee ledger.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Professor; a student exists.
Test Steps: 1. Open a student's ledger / org-fee details.
Expected Results: The student's applicable fees and transaction history are shown, with no edit or record-payment controls.
Actual Results: The student's applicable fees and transaction history are shown, with no edit or record-payment controls.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the ledger is shown read-only.

Title: Professor Cannot Record or Edit Payments
Objectives: Verify a professor has no write access to financial actions.
Test Steps:
1. Confirm the dashboard offers no record-payment / edit controls.
2. Attempt to call a write endpoint (e.g., record payment) directly.
Expected Results: No write controls are shown; write endpoints (record/edit payment, funds, expenses) reject the professor via the role guard (only Treasurer/Admin allowed).
Actual Results: No write controls are shown; write endpoints (record/edit payment, funds, expenses) reject the professor via the role guard (only Treasurer/Admin allowed).
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the professor cannot perform any write action.

Title: Update Own Avatar
Objectives: Verify the professor can change their own profile photo.
Test Steps:
1. Open the Profile.
2. Upload a valid image (JPG/PNG/WEBP, 2MB or smaller).
Expected Results: The avatar is updated and shown in the sidebar/profile. A non-image or oversized image is rejected.
Actual Results: The avatar is updated and shown in the sidebar/profile. A non-image or oversized image is rejected.

Title: Logout
Objectives: Verify the professor can sign out.
Expected Results: The session is cleared and the user is redirected to the login/home page; professor pages are no longer accessible without logging in again.
Actual Results: The session is cleared and the user is redirected to the login/home page; professor pages are no longer accessible without logging in again.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the session ends and the user is logged out.
